title: The Ones by Halos1
lyrics: Yeah, it's got me young so, yeah, yeah, yeah Wasn't with the ones Homeboy said that he wasn't with the ones Now my cousin reppin' guns And the fried damn bodies in the back of the trunk Wasn't with the ones Homeboy said that he wasn't with the ones Now my cousin reppin' guns And the fried damn bodies in the back of the trunk Hold up, could we cruise in now?
